channel.title: mbAInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from mbAInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Dow divisor explained: How the DJIA maintains continuity
item.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average has been around for a long time â 130 years, to be exact. Itâs Americaâs original stock index, and despite its eccent...

item.title: Amazonâs humble history: Jeff Bezos used a rented garage as an office and held team meetings at a local Barnes & Noble
item.description: Amazon's trajectory from a rented garage to a $2.4 trillion enterprise is now business legend.

item.title: Agentic AI Is Forcing Contracts To Govern Continuous Behavior
item.description: Agentic AI isnât about independent intent. Itâs about continuity.

item.title: How Much Does Debt Settlement Really Save?
item.description: The average all-in savings is about 18% after fees are counted, according to Money's calculations.

item.title: AI is running out of power. Space wonât be an escape hatch for decades
item.description: The physics mostly work. The timelines, economics, and infrastructure donâtâat least not yet.

item.description: Save $20 on a touchscreen tablet with plenty of memory.

item.title: Hereâs How to Rebalance Your Investments Ahead of (and During) Retirement

item.title: Royal Caribbeanâs CEO is using AI to predict how many hamburgers youâll eatâand to compete with Orlando, Vegas and Taylor Swift
